NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into this 10th day of October, 2023, by and between Dr. Samantha Lim (NRIC No. S8765432B), having an address at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and Tech Innovate Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456A), a company incorporated in Singapore with a registered address at 456 Raffles Place, #23-45, Singapore 123456.

1. Confidential Information. For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean all technical and non-technical information provided by Dr. Samantha Lim, including but not limited to, trade secrets, project plans, and financial data. Confidential Information shall not include information that is publicly available or becomes publicly available through no fault of the receiving party. Any disclosure of project status updates does not constitute a breach of this Agreement.

2. Obligations of Receiving Party. The receiving party agrees to protect and maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information. The receiving party shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without the prior written consent of Dr. Samantha Lim. The SPA, if executed, shall detail further obligations. Breaches of this clause could result in legal action.

For any queries, please contact Dr. Samantha Lim at +65 9876 5432 or email samantha.lim@testmail.sg. For secure document uploads, please use the URL: https://securefiles.sg/user/S8765432B.
